description_long: This object is a rolled map or chart, resembling an antique or vintage world map printed on paper or parchment. The map is bordered with a gold or yellow outline and features detailed cartographic markings, including continents, countries, and latitude/longitude lines. Both ends of the map are rolled inward, leaving the central portion flat and visible, with the rolled sections displaying the reverse side of the map and some colored markings. The paper appears slightly aged, with muted tones and a classic, hand-drawn style. The map is relatively thin and lightweight, with no visible hard cover or binding, and is likely used for reference or decorative purposes. The overall appearance suggests it is a historical or educational item, possibly used outdoors or in urban educational displays.
description: A rolled antique-style world map with gold borders and detailed cartographic markings, partially unrolled to reveal the central map. The paper appears aged and the ends are rolled inward, giving it a classic, vintage look.
description_view_0: The map is seen from a low, wide angle, showing both rolled ends and the central world map with gold borders clearly visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the short edge, the rolled ends are prominent and the map's length is foreshortened, with the central map details less visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, showing the map's central area and both rolled ends, with the map's orientation reversed.
description_view_3: Viewed from the opposite short edge, the rolled ends are again prominent, and the map's length is foreshortened, with the central map details less visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is a detailed, hand-drawn world map with gold borders, showing continents, countries, and grid lines in a classic cartographic style. The artwork is intricate and vintage, with muted colors and fine linework.
